attendees: Ms. Bay, Resident of Attick Towers
Elizabeth Norman, Resident of Attick Towers
residents_comments: A resident discussed fire damage to the building, and roofing repairs.
Ms. Norman inquired about the market rent rates and how it affects residents.
executive_directors_report: PY52 CDBG grant application/previous CDBG grants approved (PY48 and PY49).

Repositioning: section eight obsolescence, project assessment inspection report, updated report required, obtain GB3 to provide the updated report, project report costs of $11,750.00, two grant options (PBV contract administrator with the state of Maryland) and (PBRA HUD managed contract administration).
Elevators: one is complete, waiting on inspection.
Open and close of the government
Neighborhood food bank closing and relocating at University of MD
American legion hosting the 2025 Thanksgiving dinner
decisions: Approve the financial reports for October 31, 2025, as submitted.
Approve the regular monthly meeting minutes from September 25, 2025, as amended.
Approve the regular monthly meeting minutes from October 23, 2025, as submitted.
Approve the submission of the PY52 CDBG grant application.
Approve the Dominion Due Diligence performing the project assessment report at a cost of 11,750.00.
Approve the payment of invoices submitted over $4,000 for October 2025.

VI. Review and Approval of Financial Reports for October 31, 2025:

The Board reviewed/discussed the (check registry, reconciliation summary, unaudited report, and
bank account statements) for October 31, 2025. A motion was made by Ms. Perez and seconded by
Mr. Catlin to approve the financial reports for October 31, 2025, as submitted. Robert Catlin, Theresa
Keeler, Leroy Kelly, James McFadden, and Arelis Perez voted for the motion. The motion was
unanimously approved by a vote of 5-0.
(2)

VIl. Decision & Approval of Minutes from the September 25, 2025 and October 23, 2025 Regular
Monthly Meeting:

The Board reviewed/discussed the minutes from the regular monthly meeting held on September 25,
2025. There was one minor correction. A motion was made by Ms. Perez and seconded by Ms. Keeler
to approve the regular monthly meeting minutes from September 25, 2025, as amended. Robert
Catlin, Theresa Keeler, Leroy Kelly, James McFadden, and Arelis Perez voted for the motion. The
motion was unanimously approved by a vote of 5-0.

The Board reviewed/discussed the minutes from the regular monthly meeting held on October 23,
2025. There were no corrections. A motion was made by Ms. Perez and seconded by Ms. Keeler to
approve the regular monthly meeting minutes from October 23...
